---
title: "Versions"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.versions-page}

# Every Version Is A Hypothesis

All experiments start from the same deterministic base: a CNO trained to predict `HR - LR` on GLORYS surface fields,
then fine-tuned with log-absolute temperature-gradient information. The goal of the version tree is to find the
best FM model after this CNO: each FM variant learns `HR - mu`, with `mu = LR + CNO(LR)`. Fine-tuning branches are
initialized from `v4_s1_logit_t`.

::: {.version-matrix}
**Main training and architecture line**

::: {.matrix-main}
[v4 · U-Net FM](v4.html){.version-card-node .root}
[v5 · FM-only](v5_fm_only.html){.version-card-node}
[v6 · geo physics](v6_full_geo_phys.html){.version-card-node}
[v7 · Swin local](v7a_swin.html){.version-card-node}
[v8 · pixel DiT](v8a_dit_pixel.html){.version-card-node}
[v9 · diffusion family](v9a_songunet_edm.html){.version-card-node}
:::

**v4 ablations**

::: {.matrix-branches}
[S1 · OT + logit-t](v4_s1_logit_t.html){.version-card-node .best}
[S2 · independent](v4_s2_independent.html){.version-card-node}
[S3 · no attention](v4_s3_no_attn.html){.version-card-node}
[S4 · grad-mu](v4_s4_grad_mu.html){.version-card-node}
:::

**Fine-tuned from S1**

::: {.matrix-finetunes}
[FT · recoarsen](v4_s1_recoarsen_ft.html){.version-card-node}
[FT · CFG](v4_s1_cfg_ft.html){.version-card-node}
[FT · regional](v4_s1_regional_ft.html){.version-card-node}
:::

**v9 branches**

::: {.matrix-v9}
[v9a · SongUNet EDM](v9a_songunet_edm.html){.version-card-node}
[v9b · bridge](v9b_songunet_bridge.html){.version-card-node}
[v9c · DiT hybrid](v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen.html){.version-card-node}
:::
:::

## Reading The Tree

::: {.compact-version-list}
[v4](v4.html)
: First CNO-conditioned residual Flow Matching family.

[v4_s1_logit_t](v4_s1_logit_t.html)
: Best early U-Net FM baseline, using [minibatch OT](../methods/minibatch-ot.html) and
[logit-normal time sampling](../methods/logit-normal.html).

[v4_s1_recoarsen_ft](v4_s1_recoarsen_ft.html)
: Fine-tuning with [re-coarsening consistency](../methods/recoarsening.html).

[v4_s1_cfg_ft](v4_s1_cfg_ft.html)
: Fine-tuning with condition dropout for [classifier-free guidance](../methods/cfg.html).

[v4_s1_regional_ft](v4_s1_regional_ft.html)
: Regional oversampling for Mediterranean, Black Sea and polar failures.

[v7a_swin](v7a_swin.html)
: Local window attention using a [Swin-style](../methods/swin.html) backbone.

[v8a_dit_pixel](v8a_dit_pixel.html)
: Pixel-space [DiT](../methods/dit.html) replacing the U-Net FM backbone.

[v9a / v9b / v9c](v9a_songunet_edm.html)
: Diffusion alternatives: [EDM](../methods/edm.html), [bridge](../methods/bridge.html), and DiT hybrid.
:::

:::
